scope: Telegram real-user MTProto account operating SOP, rate limits, batching, and ToS guardrails

account_policy.allowed_account_type: Telegram user account operated via MTProto/Telethon only after owner authorization

tos_guardrails: Use only accounts that the project is authorized to operate.
Do not buy, rent, scrape, or share Telegram accounts.
Do not send spam, unsolicited bulk outreach, deceptive messages, phishing, malware, adult solicitation, or harassment.
Do not evade Telegram limits, flood waits, bans, reports, or anti-abuse controls.
Do not add users to groups/channels without consent.
Do not use automation to impersonate a person outside the approved ERIS chat context.
Honor opt-out immediately and do not re-contact marketing opt-outs.
Stop or pause sending if Telegram returns FloodWait, peer flood, account restriction, or repeated user reports.
allowed_use_cases: beta test conversations with invited users
blocked_use_cases: messages to users who opted out
pause_conditions: FloodWait or peer flood is returned by Telegram.
Any account status becomes banned, restricted, or disabled.
User report, block, or opt-out rate rises above normal baseline.
Outbound failures exceed 5% over the last hour.
A session, api_hash, or Fernet key may have leaked.
An operator requests pause for safety, privacy, or ToS review.

daily_preflight: Confirm MTProto_ENABLED is intended for the environment.
Confirm active telegram_accounts are authorized and not banned.
Confirm per-account counters are below signed limits.
Confirm opt-out and safety queues have no unresolved blocker.
incident_actions: Stop queued outbound tasks for that account.
Notify release owner and document the incident.
Resume only after the root cause is fixed and counters are reset.

acceptance: Frequency limits are signed and machine-readable.
Batch limits prohibit cold outreach and marketing blasts.
Pause conditions and incident actions are documented.

final_confirmation.confirmation_text: H-01, H-02, H-05, H-07, H-08, H-09, H-10, H-11 all confirmed approved.
